case_title: LINDA HUANG VS. A PLACE FOR ROVER, INC.

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO CONTINUE PER DEFENDANT'S REQUEST.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,666.75 FILED BY HUANG, LINDA AS TO DEFENDANT A PLACE FOR ROVER, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-01-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL (AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS: NATIONAL REGISTER AGENTS, INC.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HUANG, LINDA AS TO DEFENDANT A PLACE FOR ROVER, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (AGENT FOR SERVICE: NATIONAL REGISTERED AGENTS, INC.) SERVED DEC-10-2021, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT A PLACE FOR ROVER, INC.
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM, FILED BY DEFENDANT IS DENIED.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-01-2022 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO MAR-22-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF LINDA HUANG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT A PLACE FOR ROVER, INC IS PRESENT VIA UNAUTHORIZED ZOOM APPEARANCE REPRESENTED BY JORDAN MCGREGOR. CONTINUANCE TO ALLOW DEFENDANT TO SUBMIT A TIMELY ZOOM APPEARANCE REQUEST. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
CORRESPONDENCE RECEIVED BY DEFENDANT A PLACE FOR ROVER, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-22-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-22-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF LINDA HUANG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT A PLACE FOR ROVER, INC IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY JORDAN MCGREGGOR, CLAIMS MANAGER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-22-2022 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HUANG, LINDA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT A PLACE FOR ROVER, INC. $726.80 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $791.80 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
